queries.question: What tour guides work at Expedia and what travel agents also work there?
queries.sql:
SELECT TourGuides.name
FROM Agencies JOIN TourGuides ON Agencies.AgencyID = TourGuides.AgencyID
WHERE Agencies.Name = "Expedia"
UNION
SELECT TravelAgents.name
FROM Agencies JOIN TravelAgents ON Agencies.AgencyID = TravelAgents.AgencyID
WHERE Agencies.Name = "Expedia"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?agencies a :Agency .
    ?tourguides a :TourGuides .
    ?tourguides p:hasAgencies ?agencies .
    ?tourguides p:name ?name .
    ?agencies p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Expedia")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?agencies a :Agency .
    ?travelagents a :TravelAgents .
    ?travelagents p:hasAgencies ?agencies .
    ?travelagents p:name ?name .
    ?agencies p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Expedia")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
}
